name: Keyboard Warrior
short_description: Keyboard Warrior is platform game with high tempo battle mechanics using many buttons and the story of a dreamer becoming a keyboard warrior.
detailed_description:
One day dreamer wants to be a keyboard warrior and starts his adventure.
Keyboard Warrior is a platform game packed with annoying jokes that need to use many buttons

  • You can attack with three different attack words.
  • Two health upgrades.
  • Two jump upgrades.
  • Platform elements: windmills, lighthouses, turrets ...
  • If you do not want to use more buttons you can also attack with "alt" and "ctrl.

    Gameplay:
  • Play using the words in the upper left corner of the screen.
  • You need to write heal from the keyboard for heal And you need to write hit from the keyboard for attack and so on ...
